RAGEducation.Purpose: Provide LLM context for understanding the LSM (Logistics & Stock Management) system without exposing sensitive personal data. Used for RAG-based code generation and education.

Concept.name: EOQ (Wilson Model)
Concept.Description: Economic Order Quantity = sqrt(2DS/H) where D=annual demand, S=order cost, H=holding cost

Concept.name: ABC Classification
Concept.Description: Pareto analysis categorizing articles by annual consumption value: A (top 70% value, ~20% items), B (next 20% value, ~30% items), C (last 10% value, ~50% items)

Concept.name: CMUP (Coût Moyen Unitaire Pondéré)
Concept.Description: Weighted Average Unit Cost = Total Inventory Value / Total Quantity On Hand
Concept.Formula: CMUP = (Old Stock * Old CMUP + New IN * New Price) / (Old Stock + New IN)

Concept.name: ROP (Reorder Point)
Concept.Description: ROP = (Average Daily Demand * Lead Time) + Safety Stock
Concept.Trigger: When current stock ≤ ROP, generate purchase alert

Module.name: mod_StockEngine
Module.purpose: Stock calculations (EOQ, CMUP, ABC, ROP, SS)

Module.name: mod_StockEntry_Logic
Module.purpose: Form state management and transaction commit

Module.name: mod_SyncBridge
Module.purpose: Data sync between transactions and calculated metrics

Module.name: mod_Database
Module.purpose: Secure write layer for MOUVEMENTS ledger

Pattern.name: FormState
Pattern.desc: Struct pattern: form owns UI, logic owns business rules. No direct control references in logic.

Pattern.name: Clean-Slate Build
Pattern.desc: Never modify .xlsm directly. Fix source .bas files, then rebuild from master.

Pattern.name: UDT Array Return
Pattern.desc: User-defined types cannot be returned as Variant. Use ByRef Sub pattern.

Pattern.name: Runtime Controls
Pattern.desc: Controls created via Controls.Add() must be accessed via Controls(name), not direct member access.

BuildProtocol.Step: Save as NEW file (fresh p-code cache)

SecurityModel.Rule: All sheets protected with master password (mod_Config.MASTER_PWD)
All operations logged to AUDIT_LOG sheet (append-only)
Transactions support atomic rollback on failure
No external dependencies - fully offline VBA processing

Sheet.name: ARTICLES
Sheet.columns: CODE, DESIGNATION, STOCK, UNITE, CATEGORIE, CLASSE_ABC, CMUP, SECU

Sheet.name: FOURNISSEURS
Sheet.columns: CODE_F, RAISON_SOCIALE, VILLE, TEL, FAX, EMAIL, DELAI

Sheet.name: MOUVEMENTS
Sheet.columns: N°_MVT, DATE, CODE_ARTICLE, TYPE_MVT, QTE_ENTREE, QTE_SORTIE, PU, VALEUR, REF_DOC, TIERS

LLMContext.Guidance: When generating VBA code for LSM: - Use Option Explicit in all modules - PascalCase naming for procedures and variables - Comments in French - Use Chr(233) for é, Chr(201) for É - No XLOOKUP (Excel 2010 compatibility) - Always include On Error GoTo in public procedures - Use Application.ScreenUpdating/EnableEvents/Calculation optimization

AntiPatterns.AntiPattern: Never use XLOOKUP, FILTER, or Excel 365 functions
Never reference form controls directly in logic modules
Never return UDT arrays as Variant
Never place Private declarations after Public procedures
Never include Attribute VB_Name in injected document module code
